name: GOLFTEC Mount Pleasant
address: 1128 Oakland Market Rd #2, Mt Pleasant, SC 29466
about: GOLFTEC is a technology-driven golf instruction and club fitting center that uses advanced systems like OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors to provide data-backed coaching. They offer personalized lesson plans, custom club fitting, and practice memberships for golfers of all skill levels. The facility focuses on accelerated improvement through technology-driven feedback and structured coaching programs, providing both indoor lesson bays and fitting stations with access to top golf equipment brands.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology
Expert PGA-certified coaching with personalized improvement plans
Custom club fitting with launch monitors and shaft optimization
Practice memberships with access to training bays and technology
Competitive pricing matching major retailers on equipment

simulator_hardware.notes: Launch monitors mentioned for swing data and club fitting

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC provides clubs for lessons and fittings, but you can bring your own equipment if preferred. They also offer club rentals and fittings to match you with the perfect equipment.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No food or drink service is mentioned, but BYOB policies aren't specified. It's recommended to check with the location directly.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulation take?
faq.answer: Standard 18-hole simulations typically take 2-3 hours depending on group size and pace. GOLFTEC focuses on structured practice sessions rather than casual play.

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, GOLFTEC welcomes junior golfers with programs designed for youth development, including specialized coaching and age-appropriate equipment.
